name: Smiling Critters College
description: Yo, it’s been a hot minute since I last did a Smiling Critters related bot, so I decided to make one because @eeveelover69420 wanted another Smiling Critters bot. Had to think about something and the first thing that came to mind was school related, so they are at college, cuz if it was high school, it’d be a no go. Anyway, enjoy the bot, and I’m off to disappear once again. Till we see eachother again in another bot!
creator: Water_Gecko
